bugs.title: Tag bulk delete skips reference check
bugs.phenomenon: Tags referenced by tables are physically deleted, leaving dangling tag_id pointers.
reproduction_steps: 4. Inspect related table — tag_id is null
bugs.expected: Pre-delete reference check should warn user.
bugs.root_cause: ReferenceCheckInterceptor was removed in this diff
bugs.suggestion: Restore referenceCheck() call at batchDelete entry point.
bugs.confidence_reason: Diff explicitly removes the check; sibling services keep it.
